description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a dark metallic barrel and two large cylindrical tanks mounted parallel to the main body, connected by reinforced brackets. The stock is compact and angular, with a visible grip and a mechanical trigger assembly. The barrel is wide and flared at the muzzle, suggesting a high-dispersion firing pattern. Red bands secure the tanks, adding a visual accent and possibly reinforcing the structure. A scope or sighting device is mounted on top, enhancing aiming precision. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, giving it a rugged, functional look suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, double-tank shotgun with a flared barrel, compact stock, and mounted sight, featuring dark metal and red accents. Its industrial design suggests durability and high performance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the flared barrel, dual tanks, and mounted sight clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin tanks and the compact stock, with the sight and barrel end aligned in the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tanks, barrel, and grip, with the sight and trigger assembly partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wide, flared muzzle and the alignment of the tanks behind it, with the sight and grip visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a wide, flared muzzle; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, unreinforced design
